empty.title: No bank accounts
empty.description: Add bank accounts to facilitate transactions with this contact.

editImpact.title: Confirm bank account changes
editImpact.makePrimary: This account will become the primary account and will be used in future payments and documents that read live banking data.
editImpact.updateSensitive: Changes to IBAN, bank, holder, or primary-account status affect future exports, payments, and documents that use live banking data.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the account

setPrimaryDialog.title: Set primary account
setPrimaryDialog.confirmation: The account {bankName} will be set as the contact's primary account.
setPrimaryDialog.impact: Future payments and documents that use the primary bank account will display this account.

toasts.deleteError: The account could not be deleted.
toasts.setPrimary: The account {bankName} was set as primary.
toasts.setPrimaryError: The primary account could not be set.

impact.futureUse: This account will no longer be available for future payments, invoice PDFs, and flows that use live banking data.
impact.snapshotPreserved: Already issued documents that contain banking snapshots will not change.
impact.deletePrimary: This is the primary account. After deletion, set a new primary account if this contact must continue to be used for payments.
impact.deleteLastActive: This is the last active bank account for this contact.
impact.deleted: Future payments and documents that read live banking data will no longer use this account.
impact.primaryDeleted: The primary account was removed. Future documents and payments will no longer have this default account.
impact.primaryApplied: Future payments and documents that use the primary bank account will now show this account.
impact.updatedSensitive: These changes will be used in future payments, exports, and documents that read live banking data.
impact.createdPrimary: The new account was saved as primary and will be used in future payment-facing flows.
